---
title:  Lecture 8
subtitle:  Spatial Data Part 1 - 
format: stat198slides-revealjs
---

# Agenda

1.  Discussion of reading

2.  Geographic Data

3.  Projections and Coordinates

4.  Map Visualizations

5.  Activity: Choropleth Map Recreation

# Icebreaker

Weather app locations

# Reading Discussion

## Discuss in groups of 2-3

::::: columns
::: {.column width="60%"}
1.  **Review:** What data is shown? How is color used to encode ordinal, binary, or nominal data?

2.  **Praise:** What's one thing you liked about how the graphic portrays data?

3.  **Critique:** What's one change that would make it better?
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
![](images/reading_graph.png)
:::
:::::

# Learning Goals

::: incremental
1.  **Explain** why preattentive attributes guide the viewer's eye before conscious thought
2.  **Apply** Gestalt principles to design cleaner, more effective visualizations
:::

# Types of Geographic Data



# Projections and Coordinate Systems



# Common Types of Map Visualizations

:::::: incremental
::::: columns
::: column
-   Choropleth Maps ![](images/choropleth-ex.png)
:::

::: column
-   Symbol/Proportional Maps ![](images/proportional-map-ex.png)
:::
:::::
::::::
